query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, a.week_start_date, a.day_of_week, a.time_blocks, a.confirmed
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.worker_id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
ORDER BY a.week_start_date DESC, a.day_of_week
LIMIT 10;
